basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Associate-I Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IISER Pune website. The last date to submit the application form is 15-07-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be provided commensurate with educational qualification/s and/or experience/s with prior approval of the competent authority.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Biology / Biotechnology / Life Sciences / Biochemistry or related areas with a CGPA above 6.5 OR equivalent scorecard.
qualification.details: Project Associate-I: M.Sc. in Biology / Biotechnology / Life Sciences / Biochemistry or related areas with a CGPA above 6.5 OR equivalent scorecard. Experience: Initially for a period of 1 year extendable for further period subject to satisfactory performance of the incumbent and continuation of the project.

salary_details.details: Project Associate-I: Rs.30,000/- + 30% House Rent Allowance per month

selection_process: Shortlisting of candidates Verification of documents Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IISER Pune Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISER Pune to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate-I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IISER Pune Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IISER Pune Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate-I Vacancy Details 2026
IISER Pune Project Associate-I Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I: M.Sc. in Biology / Biotechnology / Life Sciences / Biochemistry or related areas with a CGPA above 6.5 OR equivalent scorecard. Experience: Initially for a period of 1 year extendable for further period subject to satisfactory performance of the incumbent and continuation of the project.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate-I Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate-I Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be provided commensurate with educational qualification/s and/or experience/s with prior approval of the competent authority.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate-I Salary / Stipend 2026
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I: Rs.30,000/- + 30% House Rent Allowance per month

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IISER Pune Project Associate-I Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Shortlisting of candidates Verification of documents Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IISER Pune Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISER Pune to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IISER Pune Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Project Associate-I position at IISER Pune is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc. in Biology, Biotechnology, Life Sciences, Biochemistry, or related areas with a CGPA above 6.5 or an equivalent scorecard.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I post is 35 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month plus 30% House Rent Allowance.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Associate-I position at IISER Pune.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official IISER Pune website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates, verification of documents, and an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is purely temporary and contractual for a period of one year, extendable based on performance and project continuation.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the direct links to the official notification PDF and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
